title: National Advisory Council on Poverty - Canada.ca
content:
## National Advisory Council on Poverty
The National Advisory Council on Poverty (the Council) helps the Government of Canada stay accountable to Canadians for lowering poverty. The Council:
- advises the Minister of Jobs and Families (the Minister) on poverty reduction
- reports annually on the progress made to meeting the poverty reduction targets
- engages Canadians in discussions about poverty
- undertakes activities specified by the Minister

## Services and information
Annual reports of the National Advisory Council on Poverty
EDSC.CCNP-NACP.ESDC@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
